projectSchedules.title: Schedules
projectSchedules.sub: Cron-driven run launches for this project's tasks

triggerOutcome.queued_pending: Run queued behind the concurrency cap
triggerOutcome.catchup_queued: Catch-up queued for when the task frees up
triggerOutcome.skipped_task_busy: Skipped: task already has an active run
triggerOutcome.skipped_target_terminal: Skipped: task is in a terminal state

overlapHint.skip: Skip the fire while the task already has an active run
overlapHint.queue_one: Remember one missed fire and launch it when the task frees up
overlapHint.start_anyway: Launch past the global concurrency cap (the run queues as Pending); a task with an active run is still skipped

flows.title: Flows
flows.sub: Create local Flow drafts, inspect installed executable packages, and keep package YAML visible before publication tooling lands.
flows.authoredFilteredEmpty: No authored Flow drafts match the current filters.
flows.installedEmpty: No executable Flow packages are installed for visible projects.
flows.installedFilteredEmpty: No installed package attachments match the current filters.
flows.newSub: Start with a portable flow.yaml draft. Publishing here stores local catalog content only; it does not install or execute package hooks.
flows.localOnly: Local catalog only. This draft is not an installed runnable package.
flows.saveHint: Saving parses YAML and stores the raw text plus parsed manifest. Launches still use installed package revisions only.

auth.subLogin: Your instance is ready. Sign in to your control plane.
auth.subRegister: Solo today, teams next. Spin up your first project in under a minute.
auth.forgotPlaceholder: Password reset is not available on this single-host POC. Ask an admin to reset it.
auth.remember: Keep me signed in for 30 days on this device
auth.terms: I'm OK with operating a POC release on a single host.
auth.hintPwd: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
auth.errorDuplicate: An account with this email already exists.
auth.errorWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
auth.errorPending: This account is waiting for admin approval.
auth.errorDisabled: This account is disabled. Ask an admin to re-enable it.
auth.registerPending: Account created. An admin must activate it before you can sign in.
auth.strength0: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
auth.strength2: OK · add a digit or symbol for stronger.

side.spineH3rest: Backlog → merge, with actions and decisions history.
side.spineSub: Projects, tasks, agents, humans — and every handoff between. HITL where it counts. Autonomy where you trust it.

portfolio.heading: Projects.
portfolio.subheading: {projects} repos under management. {workspaces} workspaces in flight. {needs} things waiting on you.
portfolio.ticker: {projects} projects · {workspaces} workspaces in flight · {needs} waiting on you
portfolio.launchUnavailableHint: Launches pause until the supervisor is ready.
portfolio.newProjectSub: connect a repo · scaffold a new one
portfolio.emptyBody: MAIster manages repos, runs, and agents for you. Point us at a git remote or a folder — we'll do the rest.
portfolio.esTip1: ⌘L launches a run once the supervisor is ready.
portfolio.esTip2: Each run lives in its own worktree — diff and merge with proof.
portfolio.esTip3: Active runs stay pinned to the rail, always one click away.

observatory.title: Observatory
observatory.subtitle: Correction pressure, autonomy, and repeatable signals from existing run evidence.
observatory.reviewDwellExcluded: Review dwell without HITL is excluded.
observatory.noNodes: No node attempts in this window.
observatory.observationsOnly: Observations only. No write-side learning is active.

harness.sectionSubtitle: Sensor firing, control effectiveness, and coverage — correlational signals, not recommendations.
harness.noFiring: No gate executions in this window.
harness.neverFiredHint: Verify gate quality or a blind spot.
harness.noCoverage: No flow revisions used in this window.
harness.noEffectiveness: No gate verdicts in this window.
harness.noCapabilities: No runs with a resolved capability set.

scratch.newSubtitle: Open a conversation-style coding agent session outside the task board, with its own worktree, branch, attachments, and capability profile.
scratch.prompt: What do you want to do?
scratch.promptPlaceholder: Describe the change, investigation, or experiment.
scratch.fileSummary: {count, plural, one {# file} other {# files}}, {bytes} bytes
scratch.messagePlaceholder: Continue the conversation with the coding agent.
scratch.messageDisabled: This run is not waiting for user input.
scratch.recoverHint: This run's session ended (e.g. on restart). Type a message below and send to resume it.
scratch.recoverPlaceholder: Tell the resumed agent what to do next.

board.launchSupervisorUnavailable: Supervisor unavailable. Start or recover the supervisor daemon, then retry.
board.prsDeferred: Pull-request sync isn't wired up on this POC yet.
board.mcpsDeferred: MCP server management isn't wired up on this POC yet.
board.defaultAgentDesc: used for new runs unless overridden per-task

projects.addSub: Clone a Git repo by URL, or point MAIster at an existing local repo. Either must contain a maister.yaml.
projects.sourceHint: Provide a Git URL to clone, or a name/path for an existing local repo.
projects.warnUrlCreds: This URL embeds credentials — they'll be stored as entered. Prefer host SSH keys or a git credential helper.
projects.errorConflict: A project with this slug or repo path is already registered.
projects.errorInstall: A configured Flow plugin failed to install.
projects.errorForbidden: Only an admin can register a project.
projects.errorClone: Couldn't clone or resolve the repository. Check the URL or path and host git credentials.
projects.warnNotGit: Registered, but the repo has no remote — pull-request promotion won't work until you add one.
projects.warnInitialized: Registered and a new git repo was initialized — make an initial commit before launching runs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteMcpConfirm: Delete this MCP server? This cannot be undone.
settings.secretRefHint: Secret references only (env:NAME) — values resolve server-side.
settings.deleteConfirm: Delete this runner? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteBlockedIntro: This runner is still referenced by:
settings.validId: Use letters, digits, dot, underscore or hyphen.
settings.forbidden: Only an admin can view settings.
settings.envNote: Read-only — set via MAISTER_REPOS_ROOT and MAISTER_WORKTREES_ROOT.
settings.flowRunnerReconfigurationHint: Map Flow package runner ids that are not present in the platform catalog.

launch.optionsError: Could not load branches. Try again.

run.noPending: No input is pending for this run.
run.responseHint: Enter a JSON value matching the requested schema below.
run.formInstructions: Pick an option or type your own answer for each field.
run.targetDrift: The target branch advanced since this review. Re-review the updated diff, or promote anyway.
run.relaunchToPromote: This run predates branch targeting and has no promotion metadata. Relaunch the task to promote it.
run.diffTruncated: This diff is too large to show in full (over 4 MiB) and was truncated. Review the complete change in the pull request or via `git diff` before promoting.
run.returnNotOwner: Only the reviewer who claimed this run can return it.
run.settingsDeclaredIntentNote: Declared intent, shown for visibility. In this build settings are recorded only — they are not yet enforced or delivered to the agent (materialized in M14).
run.capabilitySubtitle: Capabilities materialized for each AI node (recorded; enforcement pending live verification).
run.capabilityNoProfiles: No capability profiles for this run
run.crashRecoverableHint: A checkpoint survived. You can recover the run or discard its workspace.
run.notRecoverable: This run cannot be recovered — discard its workspace to free the branch.
run.recoverConfirmBody: Recovery re-runs the current node from its last checkpoint. Work already saved to the worktree is kept, but the node executes again from the start.
run.recoverQueued: The host is at capacity — recovery is queued and will resume when a slot frees.
run.recoverConflict: This run can no longer be recovered. Refresh and discard its workspace instead.
run.recoverGone: The checkpoint is gone — this run can only be discarded now.
run.recoverRetry: The supervisor is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
run.recoverError: Recovery failed. Try again, or discard the workspace.
run.discardConfirmBody: Discarding abandons the run and schedules its worktree for removal. This cannot be undone.
run.reviewApproveOpenWarn: $count open comment threads — approving leaves them unresolved.
run.reviewReworkExhausted: Rework limit reached — all $m allowed review visits are used. Only non-rework decisions remain.

error.EXECUTOR_UNAVAILABLE: The supervisor is unreachable. Retry in a moment.
error.ACP_PROTOCOL: The agent rejected the response. Reload and try again.
error.HITL_TIMEOUT: This request expired before your response was delivered.
error.CONFIG: The response was not valid for this request.
error.NEEDS_INPUT: The response was incomplete. Check the fields and try again.
error.PRECONDITION: This request is no longer available. Reload the page.
error.UNAUTHORIZED: You do not have permission to answer this request.

evidence.title: Evidence graph
evidence.empty: No evidence yet for this run.
evidence.payloadGone: Payload is gone (the backing file was deleted).
evidence.payloadError: Could not load the artifact payload.

graph.title: Flow graph
graph.empty: No flow graph for this run.
graph.saveError: Could not save the node position.

files.title: Repo files
files.tooLarge: File is too large to display
files.forbidden: You do not have access to repository files

diff.title: Diff
diff.truncated: Diff truncated — over the 4 MiB view limit; showing a partial diff.

changePassword.title: Change your password
changePassword.sub: Your account requires a new password before you can continue.
changePassword.hint: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
changePassword.errorWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
changePassword.errorMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
changePassword.errorGeneric: Could not update the password. Try again.

account.title: Personal settings
account.sub: Manage the details attached to your signed-in MAIster account.
account.profileSub: This name appears in the shell and project activity.
account.profileError: Enter a display name between 1 and 120 characters.
account.passwordSub: Set a new password for this account. Use at least 12 characters.
account.passwordHint: Use 12+ characters with a mix of letters, numbers and symbols
account.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 12 characters.
account.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
account.passwordError: Could not update the password. Try again.

adminScheduler.title: Scheduler
adminScheduler.sub: Manage background scheduler jobs: system sweeps, commands, agent ticks, and scheduled Flow runs.
adminScheduler.tableSub: Jobs are claimed on each /api/cron/tick. Disabled jobs are skipped.
adminScheduler.noResults: No scheduler jobs match these filters.
adminScheduler.targetMustBeObject: Target must be a JSON object.
adminScheduler.cadenceInvalid: Cadence must be a positive whole number of seconds.
adminScheduler.maxFailuresInvalid: Max failures must be a positive whole number.

targetHint.agent_tick: Free-form target passed to the agent launcher.

adminUsers.title: User management
adminUsers.sub: Approve new registrations, adjust global roles, disable access, and reset passwords.
adminUsers.tableSub: Pending users cannot sign in until an admin activates them.
adminUsers.name: Name
adminUsers.tempPasswordOnce: This password is shown once — store it securely before closing.
adminUsers.passwordBlankHint: Leave blank to let the server generate a password.
adminUsers.deleteBlocked: Only unused pending accounts can be deleted. Disable this account instead.

packages.title: Flow Packages
packages.empty: No Flow packages installed for this project.
packages.adminOnly: Package management requires the admin project role.

mcpPanel.title: Project MCP servers
mcpPanel.adminOnly: Managing project MCP servers requires the admin project role.
mcpPanel.empty: No project MCP servers configured yet.
mcpPanel.secretRefHint: Secrets are env:NAME references only — never raw values.

tokens.title: API tokens
tokens.empty: No API tokens for this project yet.
tokens.adminOnly: Managing API tokens requires the admin project role.
tokens.secretWarning: This secret is shown once and cannot be retrieved later.

dialog.dirty: Commit dirty work before pushing this run branch.
dialog.handoffHelp: Creates and pushes a separate branch at the current worktree HEAD.
dialog.invalidRemote: Remote names can use letters, numbers, _, ., /, or - and cannot start with -.
dialog.invalidBranch: Branch names can use letters, numbers, _, ., /, or - and cannot contain .., @{, a trailing slash, or .lock.

body.stop: Stop the run and keep its worktree for review.
body.archive: Preserve recoverable work into an archive ref and keep the worktree on disk.
body.drop: Preserve recoverable work, then remove only the MAIster-owned worktree.

projectMembers.title: Team members
projectMembers.sub: People with access to this project.
projectMembers.removeConfirm: Remove this member from the project?
projectMembers.alreadyMember: This user is already a member.
projectMembers.staleConflict: This member was changed by someone else. Refresh and try again.

toolbar.selectNodeHint: Select a node to add a gate

diff.empty: No changes since the last published revision
